action.reasoning: Observation: Iter2 failed immediately due to deprecated 'verbose' arg in ReduceLROnPlateau (PyTorch version incompatibility); iter1 baseline had mean_r2=-2.17e11 (driven by r2_ptend_q=-5e11, others decent at 0.22/0.92/0.62). Analysis: Simple MLP underfits on q-tendency after only 2 epochs; ~36s/epoch allows ~15 epochs within time. Decision: Remove verbose=False, add best-model checkpointing on val_mse, set epochs=15 + weight_decay=1e-5 for stability, log metrics properly; submit_eval right after to get improved baseline and time measurement before further scaling.
